name: writing-polish
description: Professional Chinese writing skill based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然) methodology with 230+ anti-AI-taste rules. v4.3 adds context-aware whitelists (firewall in IT context, 对标 in 党政咨询 context auto-exempt via ±2 line window), dynamic density thresholds by sentence count, 5 consulting-report-specific constraints (§1.8), 11 real-world anchors (incl. cicpa consulting template), and evals dual-track (LLM behavior + 6 scan regression fixtures). 基于专业方法论的中文写作辅助与审稿润色，v4.3 新增上下文感知白名单 + 千句密度动态阈值 + 咨询报告专属约束 + 11 篇真实锚本 + 双轨 evals 体系。
